name: Coqodaq
signatureBowl: Bone-in Korean fried chicken 'bucket' feast — multiple rounds of gluten-free fried chicken in two styles served with house sauces (gochujang or soy-garlic glaze), plus chicken consomme, banchan, cold perilla seed noodles, and soft-serve
title: Fried Chicken Bucket
description: Bone-in, two styles, gochujang or soy-garlic, consomme, banchan, soft-serve

name: Chick Chick
signatureBowl: Korean and Nashville-style fried chicken (tenders, sandwiches, wings, or whole bird); crisp amber skin with sticky-sweet black pepper soy glaze and a spicy chile finish
title: Soy Glaze Fried Chicken
description: Crisp amber skin, sticky black pepper soy glaze, spicy chile finish

name: Ariari
signatureBowl: Korean fried chicken tidbits in a thick, crunchy curry-powder wrapper with a gochujang-style chile-paste aioli dipping sauce; neither too spicy nor too sweet
title: Curry Fried Chicken
description: Crunchy curry-powder crust, gochujang chile-paste aioli dip

name: Atoboy
signatureBowl: Korean fried chicken (thighs and drums) with a thick, crispy crust topped with fried garlic chips; offered as a fried chicken add-on to the prix fixe
title: Garlic Fried Chicken
description: Thighs and drums, crispy crust, fried garlic chips

name: Yetnal Tongdak
signatureBowl: Whole bird fried without starch; soy-garlic glazed wings (subtly sweet and tangy)
title: Soy-Garlic Wings
description: Starch-free whole bird, sweet-tangy soy-garlic glaze

name: Tofu Tofu
title: Honey Spicy Fried Chicken
description: spicy fried chicken glazed like pure honey

name: Golden HOF - Korean Bar & Grill
signatureBowl: Korean fried chicken in four glazes ($19 each) - garlic-soy, General Sam's (kkanpunggi-style), gochujang, and cumin with green Szechuan peppercorn (the recommended one)
appearsOn: Resy - Golden HOF and NY Kimchi Revive Two Great Restaurant Traditions
Resy - The Top Restaurants in NYC Right Now (Hit List)
title: Cumin Green Szechuan Fried Chicken
description: Korean fried chicken with the cumin and green Sichuan peppercorn variety as the standout

name: Turntable Chicken & Rock
signatureBowl: Classic Korean fried chicken wings (8 for $17) - soy garlic, spicy gochujang, or half-half - with a crunchy, saucy crust and juicy meat, served with pickled radish
appearsOn: Resy - Where to Find Every Kind of Korean Food in New York
title: Soy Garlic Chicken Wings
description: Retro vinyl-themed chimaek gastropub; classic wings with a crunchy, saucy crust
